dominators: Is it guaranteed that whenever line 6:  <statement> int bt[]={3, 6, 9, 3}; </statement> is reached, the statement line 8:  <statement> wt[0] = 0; </statement> has already been reached?

data_dependency: Does variable i at line 14: <statement>     for (int  i = 0; i < n ; i++)  </statement> determine the value stored in variable total_wt at line 16: <statement>         total_wt = total_wt + wt[i];  </statement>?
